question: The chart displays the number of annual cybersecurity incidents over several years. Based on this data, which of the following conclusions can be made?

options.A: The number of incidents in 2008-09 is the second-highest among all the years shown.
options.B: The number of incidents in 2013-14 is higher than in 2008-09.
options.C: The number of incidents in 2006-07 is nearly three times that in 2007-08.
options.D: The number of incidents is the same in 2011-12 and 2012-13.

explanation: This bar chart uses dual encoding: the same value is shown with bar height, bar width, and color intensity. That combination exaggerates differences and can make moderate gaps look much larger. The reliable conclusion is the correct option based on the numeric labels/data.
